text:
There was a pond with a very peculiar frog. Every summer, this frog would say things like, "Time for a splash!" and jump twenty feet into the air. Every time.

People chuckled.

One day, as usual, she flew high, and something caught her eye—tiny bubbles.

She floated down.

She saw fish swimming and decided to investigate. The fish welcomed her.

She discovered they'd been popping them using these little pearls.

"Why?" she asked.

"To taste delicious!"

She decided to eat them. They were delightful.

A wise old toad gazed upon her.

"You live here, don't you?"

Yeah. I feel happy.

The frog pondered. "What do I do?"

Just listen.

She listened.

She heard singing.

She sang.

Soon birds joined her.

They soared across the sky.

The birds soared high.

The frogs soared.

Together they soared.

That's why they said, "Because we sing!"

They soared with joy.

She swam away
